message:
Add comprehensive unit tests for PromptGrid component (20 tests)

Tests cover:
- Loading state: skeleton cards, grid layout
- Empty state: message display, centered text
- Populated state: rendering, grid structure, prompt ordering
- Callback propagation: onPromptCopy, onPromptClick
- Edge cases: single prompt, many prompts
- Accessibility: screen reader support
- State transitions: loading to populated/empty

Closes bead jeffreysprompts.com-2ou3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
